description: CompositionGrey and red striped shirt made of 100% cotton, has a spread collar with full front button placket, short sleeves, pocket on the left chest with a buttoned closure, branding above the pocket, flap design on the button above the hem and a curved hemFitRegularWash careDelicate machine wash with warm water using a mild detergentDo not bleach or dry cleanTumble dry lowWarm iron do not iron on decorationsThis Levi's cotton shirt traces a relaxed silhouette, flattering all body shapes to make you look your casual best. This off-duty essential is a must-have for the modern urban male. Slip into jeans with sneakers or suede shoes to complement this trendy-yet-classic shirt.Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18.5"
